title: enneapogon brachystachyus
intro: Enneapogon brachystachyus, also known as the short-spiked grass or short-spiked one-scaled grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Enneapogon brachystachyus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Enneapogon brachystachyus is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
